ham.subject: Ticket #12345 Resolved – Merge Request Updated
ham.body:
Hi Team,

I wanted to let you know that Ticket #12345 has been resolved and the associated GitHub pull request has been merged. The changes to the authentication module are now live in the staging environment.

Key points:
- All unit tests pass.
- Regression tests for login flows are green.
- The PR was reviewed and approved by @jane_doe.

Please pull the latest changes and run your integration tests. If you encounter any issues, feel free to open a new ticket.

Thanks,
John Smith
Software Engineer

spam.subject: Urgent: Immediate Action Required for Your Income Tax Refund
spam.body:
Dear Mr. Smith,

The Income Tax Department (ITD) has identified a pending refund of INR 1,25,000 that is due to you. To receive the refund, you must verify your bank account details within the next 48 hours.

Failure to comply will result in a penalty and may lead to the suspension of your tax account.

Please click on the link below to submit your banking information securely:

<URL>

For your reference, your taxpayer ID is: ITD-2023-5678.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Sincerely,

R. Kumar
Senior Officer
Income Tax Department

**NOTE:** This email is part of a routine verification process. If you have already submitted your details, please disregard this message.

---

*This email was generated automatically. Do not reply to this address.*
